descriptions.en: The holder is aged 18 or over and is eligible for a HKSAR Re-entry Permit.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人年齡為18歲或以上及有資格申領香港特別行政區回港證

descriptions.en: The holder is aged between 11 and 17 and is eligible for a HKSAR Re-entry Permit.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人年齡為11歲至17歲及有資格申領香港特別行政區回港證

descriptions.en: The holder has the right of abode in the HKSAR.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人擁有香港居留權

descriptions.en: The holder's stay in the HKSAR was limited by the Director of Immigration at the time of registration of the card.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人登記領證時在香港的居留受到入境事務處處長的限制

descriptions.en: The holder has the right to land in the HKSAR.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人擁有香港入境權

descriptions.en: The holder's stay in the HKSAR was not limited by the Director of Immigration at the time of registration of the card.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人登記領證時在香港的居留不受入境事務處處長的限制

descriptions.en: The holder's reported date of birth or place of birth has been changed since first registration.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人所報稱的出生日期或地點自首次登記以後，曾作出更改

descriptions.en: The holder's reported name has been changed since first registration.
descriptions.zh-Hant: 持證人所報稱的姓名自首次登記以後，曾作出更改
